strengths: Clear identification and contextual description of three specific real-world objects, each anchored with an image and historical background.
Explicit links made between each object and the IA prompt, showing how historical developments inform present-day knowledge frameworks.
Use of supporting evidence (dates, technical details, references) to justify inclusion of each object in the exhibition.
weaknesses: Analysis often drifts into broad description or social commentary rather than sustaining focus on âcurrent knowledgeâ as a TOK concept.
Factual inaccuracy (the Declaration dated 1975 instead of 1945) undermines the credibility of the historical context.
Justifications are uneven in depth and support; some claims (e.g., physics as a âuniversal languageâ) are asserted without sufficient argument.
Reference formatting is inconsistent and incomplete, with malformed citations and standalone URLs lacking context.
No concluding synthesis that explicitly compares all three objects to answer the prompt in an integrated TOK framework.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition meets the key requirements of the 5â6 band: three wellâchosen, specifically contextualized objects; clear, relevant links to the prompt; and evidence of justification for each inclusion. However, the analysis often remains descriptive, lacks precision in its focus on âcurrent knowledge,â and contains factual and referencing errors that detract from its TOK rigour. While it demonstrates adequate understanding and fulfils most 5â6 band descriptors, it does not achieve the heightened clarity, integration and depth required for bands 7â8. A score of 6 appropriately reflects its strengths and limitations within the given rubric.

annotations.comment: Provide the complete retrieval URL and date for this resource to strengthen reference reliability.
Inline URL on a new line splits the reference; integrate it into the preceding citation to maintain coherence.
A standalone URL lacks context; include it within a full citation entry to clarify source title and authorship.
The prompt is clearly restated at the start, ensuring focus on the IA question and anchoring the exhibition in the TOK context.
Consider expanding the introduction to frame how the prompt will be addressed, explicitly linking historical development to current knowledge from the outset.
Including a clear image of the tinfoil phonograph situates the object in context and enhances the real-world connection.
The statement that the phonograph âaccounts for the vast knowledge of conceptual languagesâ is vague; specify how its invention concretely shaped scientific ways of knowing.
Tie the technical description of the phonograph to the prompt by explaining how analogue recording developments influence our current understanding of knowledge transmission.
You effectively outline the paradigm shifts from analogue to digital audio, demonstrating the historical trajectory relevant to the prompt.
This critique of the phonographâs limitations is descriptive; to deepen analysis, connect these shortcomings to how they spurred conceptual progress in understanding sound as knowledge.
The inclusion of the Declaration of Independence image concretely anchors the second object in its real historical context.
The date â1975â is incorrect; the Declaration was issued in 1945. Ensure factual accuracy to maintain credible historical context.
Rather than broad community values, focus on how the Declaration as a knowledge artifact shapes contemporary understandings of national identity.
The sentence fragment here is incomplete, interrupting the flow. Complete or remove to clarify the justification of the objectâs relevance.
You articulate how historical documents can become tools for communal knowledge, linking past events to present social cohesion.
The image of the Ã¡o yáº¿m visually anchors the third object, reinforcing its cultural and historical specificity.
Embedding mathematical tags for Vietnamese terms is inappropriate. Use proper transliteration and description instead of math formatting.
Clarify the garmentâs social impact by providing specific historical examples of how wearing the Ã¡o yáº¿m challenged class structures.
This paragraph summarizes changes in mindsets but remains descriptive; analyze how these shifts contribute to shared knowledge frameworks today.
Connect the Ã¡o yáº¿mâs changing symbolism more explicitly to current knowledge debates on gender and equality within TOK terminology.
Consider adding a concluding paragraph synthesizing how all three objects collectively answer the prompt, highlighting comparative insights.
This source lacks author and publication date; standardize references with full bibliographic details following a consistent citation style.
The citation here is malformed (contains random '\\mathbf d'); correct formatting and verify the URL.
Missing URL line break and incomplete details. Ensure each reference includes source title, date, and accessible link.
Referencing a PBS challenge demonstrates diverse source types, enriching the exhibitionâs evidential base.

strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
